forgotPassword.title: Waan ilaaway eraygaygii sirta ahaa.
forgotPassword.description: Geli cinwaankaaga iimaylka waxaanan kuu soo diri doonnaa xiriiriye dib u dejinaya eraygaaga sirta ah.

resetPassword.description: Samee eray sir ah oo cusub oo loogu talagalay akoonkaaga.

resetPassword.successDescription: Furahaaga sirta ah si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay. Waxaad ku geli kartaa eraygaaga sirta ah ee cusub.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: Xiriirinta dib u dejinta erayga sirta ah waa mid aan sax ahayn ama aan dhammaystirnayn. Fadlan laba jeer hubi xiriirka ku jira emaylkaaga.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Furaha sirta ah waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 6 xaraf.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Dib u dejinta erayga sirta ah way fashilantay. Xidhiidhku wuu shaqayn karaa ama wuu dhacay.

hero.title: Madal Ganacsiga Xoolaha Tooska ah
hero.subtitle: Madal ganacsi oo xayawaan nool ah oo ugu kalsoonida badan. Si ammaan ah u iibso oo u iibi lo'daada iyo idahaaga.

secure.title: Dukaameysi Ammaan ah
secure.description: Dhammaan macaamil ganacsiyeedyadu waa ammaan. Macluumaadka iibiyaha iyo iibsadaha waa la xaqiijiyay.

variety.title: Kala duwanaanshaha Badeecadaha Ballaaran
variety.description: Lo', ido, iyo waxyaabo kaloo badan. Si fudud u hel xayawaanka aad raadineyso.

support.title: Taageerada 24/7
support.description: Had iyo jeer waan u joognaa su'aalahaaga. Khadkayaga taageerada tooska ah waa mid firfircoon.

cta.title: Bilow Hadda
cta.subtitle: Ka qayb qaado goobta ay ku kulmaan kumannaan iibiyayaal iyo iibsadayaal ah.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Ganacsiga Xoolaha. Dhammaan xuquuqaha way xifdisan yihiin.
footer.newsletterDescription: Ha moogaan liisaska iyo dallacaadaha ugu dambeeyay.
footer.tagline: Madal ganacsi oo xayawaan nool ah oo ugu kalsoonida badan Turkiga.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Soo galitaanka Apple dhawaan ayuu firfircoonaan doonaa.

faq.title: Su'aalaha Badiya La Weydiiyo
faq.description: Jawaabaha su'aalahaaga inta badan la iska weydiiyo ee ku saabsan barnaamijkeena.

about.title: Nagu Saabsan
about.subtitle: Madal ganacsi oo xayawaan nool ah oo ugu kalsoonida badan Turkiga.

mission.title: Hadafkeena
mission.description: Annagoo si dijitaal ah u samaynayna ganacsiga xoolaha nool, waxaan higsaneynaa inaan abuurno xiriir ammaan ah, hufan, oo hufan oo u dhexeeya soo saarayaasha iyo iibsadayaasha.

vision.title: Aragtideenna
vision.description: Inay noqoto hormuudka isbeddelka dijitaalka ah ee waaxda beeraha iyo inay noqoto madal caalami ah oo ku saabsan ganacsiga xoolaha nool.

trust.title: Kalsooni
trust.description: Hufnaan iyo isku hallayn ayaa lagama maarmaan u ah dhammaan macaamil ganacsiyeedyada.

quality.title: Tayada
quality.description: Horumar joogto ah si loo bixiyo adeegga ugu fiican.

innovation.title: Hal-abuurnimo
innovation.description: Beddelidda warshadaha iyadoo la adeegsanayo tiknoolajiyad.

contact.title: Isgaarsiinta
contact.subtitle: Fadlan nala soo xiriir haddii aad qabtid wax su'aalo ah.

form.title: Noo qor
form.name: Magacaaga
form.subject: Mowduuc
form.success: Farriintaada si guul leh ayaa loo diray. Waan kula soo xiriiri doonnaa sida ugu dhakhsaha badan.
form.error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la dirayay fariinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

acceptance.title: 1. Aqbalaadda Shuruudaha
acceptance.content: Markaad isticmaasho degelkan, waxaad ogolaatay shuruudahan soo socda ee isticmaalka. Haddii aadan ku raacsanayn shuruudahan, fadlan ha isticmaalin degelkan.

services.title: 2. Adeegyada
services.content: Ganacsiga Xoolaha wuxuu bixiyaa goob lagu iibsado laguna iibiyo xoolaha nool. Dhammaan macaamil ganacsiyeedyada ku jira goobta waxaa mas'uul ka ah isticmaalaha.

accounts.title: 3. Akoonnada Isticmaalaha
accounts.content: Waa inaad bixisaa macluumaad sax ah oo casri ah si aad u sameysato akoon. Amniga akoonkaaga waa mas'uuliyaddaada.

prohibited.title: 4. Hawlaha Mamnuuca ah
prohibited.content: Xayeysiisyada marin habaabinta, macluumaadka beenta ah, khiyaanada, iyo hawlaha sharci darrada ah waa mamnuuc.

liability.title: 5. Xaddidaadda Mas'uuliyadda
liability.content: Madalku si toos ah mas'uul ugama aha macaamillada u dhexeeya dadka isticmaala. Dhammaan macaamilladu waxay ka dhacaan dhinacyada.

changes.title: 6. Isbeddellada
changes.content: Shuruudahan iyo xaaladahan waa la beddeli karaa iyada oo aan la ogeysiin. Isbeddellada ayaa dhaqan geli doona isla marka la daabaco.

collection.title: 1. Ururinta Macluumaadka
collection.content: Markaad sameysato akoon, waxaan ururinaa macluumaad shaqsiyeed sida magacaaga, cinwaanka emailkaaga, iyo lambarka taleefankaaga. Waxaan sidoo kale ururin karnaa xog aan la garanayn oo ku saabsan isticmaalkaaga bogga.

usage.title: 2. Isticmaalka Macluumaadka
usage.content: Macluumaadka aan ururinno waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu bixiyo adeegyadayada, lagu maareeyo akoonkaaga, lagu hubiyo amniga, iyo in lagu siiyo dalabyo shaqsiyeed.

sharing.title: 3. Wadaagista Macluumaadka
sharing.content: Macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed looma iibin doono ama looma kirayn doono cid saddexaad. Macluumaadkaaga lama wadaagi doono marka laga reebo ujeeddooyin sharci ah.

security.title: 4. Amniga
security.content: Tallaabooyin amni oo heer warshadeed ah ayaa la qaaday si loo ilaaliyo xogtaada.

cookies.title: 5. Buskudka
cookies.content: Mareegahayagu wuxuu adeegsadaa cookies si uu u hagaajiyo khibradda isticmaalaha. Waxaad ku maamuli kartaa doorbidyadaada cookies-ka dejimaha biraawsarkaaga.

rights.title: 6. Xuquuqdaada
rights.content: Sida ku cad Sharciga Ilaalinta Xogta Shakhsi ahaaneed ee Turkiga (KVKK), waxaad xaq u leedahay inaad gasho, saxdo, oo aad tirtirto xogtaada shakhsi ahaaneed.

subscription.title: Qorshayaasha Diiwaangelinta
subscription.autoRenewOff: Cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah waa dansan tahay
subscription.cancelConfirmTitle: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad joojiso rukunkaaga?
subscription.cancelConfirmDescription: Rukunkaagu wuxuu ahaan doonaa mid firfircoon ilaa dhammaadka muddada. Marka uu dhaco, waxaa laguu wareejin doonaa qorshaha bilaashka ah.
subscription.noSubscriptionDesc: Qorshaha bilaashka ah, waxaad daabacan kartaa ilaa 3 liis. Kordhi qorshahaaga si aad u hesho wax badan.
subscription.subscriptionExpired: Rukunkaagu wuu dhacay. Guji si aad u cusboonaysiiso.
subscription.subscriptionCancelled: Rukunkaagii waa la joojiyay. Firfircoon ilaa uu ka dhacayo.

metadata.title: Ganacsiga Xoolaha - Madal Ganacsiga Xoolaha Tooska ah
metadata.description: Madal ganacsi oo xayawaan nool oo ugu kalsoonida badan adduunka. Iibsi iyo iibin xayawaan oo ammaan ah oo hufan.

about.title: Nagu Saabsan
about.description: Baro Ganacsiga Xoolaha. Madal ganacsi oo nool oo lagu kalsoonaan karo.

contact.title: Isgaarsiinta
contact.description: Nala soo xiriir. Kooxda taageerada macaamiisha ee Ganacsiga Xoolaha ayaa diyaar u ah inay ku caawiyaan.

privacy.title: Siyaasadda Arrimaha Khaaska ah
privacy.description: Siyaasadda asturnaanta Ganacsiga Xoolaha. Baro sida xogtaada shakhsi ahaaneed loo ilaaliyo.

products.title: Badeecadaha
products.description: Ka baadho liiska xayawaanka tooska ah. Xayeysiisyo lagu kalsoonaan karo oo loogu talagalay lo'da, idaha, iyo waxyaabo kaloo badan.

sellers.title: Iibiyaasha
sellers.description: Soo hel iibiyeyaasha xoolaha ee la isku halleyn karo. Astaamaha iyo dib u eegista iibiyaha la xaqiijiyay.

transporters.title: gaadiidleyda
transporters.description: Soo hel shirkadaha gaadiidka xoolaha. Gaadiidka xoolaha nool oo ammaan ah oo xirfad leh.

search.title: Raadi
search.description: Ka raadi liiska xayawaanka nool. Raadin fudud oo leh ikhtiyaarro shaandhayn iyo kala soocid.

faq.title: Su'aalaha Badiya La Weydiiyo
faq.description: Su'aalaha iyo jawaabaha badanaa la iska weydiiyo ee ku saabsan ganacsiga xoolaha.

productDetail.title: {cinwaan} - Iib ah
productDetail.description: Iib ah {title} - {city}. Guji si aad u hesho faahfaahinta iyo macluumaadka xiriirka.

sellerDetail.title: {magac} - Bogga Iibiyaha
sellerDetail.description: Bogga iibka {name}. Dib u eegista, liisaska, iyo macluumaadka xiriirka.

transporterDetail.title: {magac} - Bogga Side-ga
transporterDetail.description: Bogga gaadiidka {name}. Meelaha adeegga, dib u eegista, iyo macluumaadka xiriirka.

boost.title: Kor u qaad
boost.noBoosts: Taariikhda kor u qaadista weli ma jirto
boost.noBoostsDesc: Iibso xirmo boost ah si aad u muujiso alaabtaada.
boost.availableOnMobile: Wax iibsiga waxaa lagu samayn karaa abka moobaylka
boost.listingLimitReached: Waxaad gaartay xadkaaga liiska. Cusbooneysii qorshahaaga.

admin.title: Guddi Maamul
admin.unauthorized: Ma haysatid ogolaansho aad ku gasho boggan.
admin.subscriptionPlansDescription: Maaree qorshayaasha rukunka, qiimaha, iyo sifooyinka.
admin.boostPackagesDescription: Maaree xirmooyinka kor u qaadista, qiimaha, iyo dejimaha muddada.
admin.editPlanDescription: Cusboonaysii faahfaahinta qorshaha, qiimaha, xadka, iyo sifooyinka.
admin.editPackageDescription: Cusboonaysii faahfaahinta xirmada, qiimaha, iyo dejinta kor u qaadista.
admin.noPackages: Ma jiraan xirmooyin kor u qaadis ah oo la helay.
admin.updateSuccess: Si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay.
admin.updateError: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii la cusbooneysiinayay.
admin.exchangeRatesDescription: Fiiri dhammaan qiimaha sarrifka lacagaha iyo xaaladdooda cusboonaysiinta.
admin.exchangeRateInfo: Heerarka sarrifka si toos ah ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyaa 6dii saacadoodba mar iyada oo loo marayo shaqada Hangfire.
